description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build page that uses the node:8.1.3 Docker image, runs only on the master branch, executes `npm i --progress=false` then `npm run build`, and stores the generated dist directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that also runs only on master, runs the commands `mkdir .public`, `cp -r dist/* .public`, and `mv .public public`, and publishes the public directory as the GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the pipeline uses the default GitLab Pages deployment mechanism.
